title: Complex economic backdrop
summary:
Main
Capesize vessels continue to thrive on the strength of Brazil-China iron ore trade, while Panamax and geared segments remain under pressure, weighed down by softer agricultural exports. By Michalis Voutsinas
Two years ago, Doric's Weekly Insight captured a market grappling with an extraordinary set of global challenges. The International Monetary Fund (IMF) emphasized a confluence of headwinds, including Russia's invasion of Ukraine, interest rate hikes aimed at controlling inflation, and lingering disruptions from the Covid-19 pandemic, particularly in China.
